editorState.prompt: Professional photography of a sophisticated brand strategy meeting room with clean, modern design elements arranged on a marble conference table. High-end marketing materials, brand color swatches, typography samples, and visual identity guidelines spread across the surface in an organized, cohesive manner. Cinematic lighting illuminates the scene with soft shadows, shot on professional DSLR with 8k resolution. The composition features clean negative space on the right side for text overlay. Photorealistic, not illustrated, not cartoonish, realistic editorial photography with natural depth of field and premium corporate atmosphere.
